steps.title: Locate x = 1.2 AU on the horizontal axis
steps.content: The line of best fit predicts density as a function of distance from the Sun. Find 1.2 on the horizontal axis labeled Distance from the Sun (AU), which sits just past the 1 AU tick.

steps.title: Trace up to the line of best fit
steps.content: From x = 1.2, move vertically until the path meets the line of best fit. Read across to the vertical axis labeled Density (g/cm³). The intersection sits near 4.6 g/cm³.

steps.title: Compare the prediction with each choice
steps.content:
Evaluate each option against the read-off value ≈ 4.6:
  • 3.6 — too low; the line is above this value at x = 1.2.
  • 4.1 — still below where the line crosses x = 1.2.
  • 4.6 — matches the line's height at x = 1.2.
  • 5.5 — too high; the line does not reach this value until a much smaller distance.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
